customAttributes.description: When this creature enters, search your library for a Forest card, put that card onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 8/14/2026. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText: After the coming of Humans, the Wood-Elves took ever more and more to the gloaming and the dusk. Still Elves they were and remained—that is, Good People.
